title: Spicy Norwegian Perilla Casserole
description: A flavorful and spicy casserole dish from Norway, featuring perilla leaves and a robust blend of spices.
instructions: Cook ground beef in a pan over medium heat until browned, breaking into small pieces.
Add chopped garlic, spicy robust seasoning, salt, and pepper to the pan and stir for 1 minute.
In a separate pan, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add chopped perilla leaves and cook until wilted.
Combine cooked beef mixture and wilted perilla leaves. Stir in casserole mix according to package instructions.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and top with additional perilla leaves if desired.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes or until the casserole is hot and bubbly.
